name: Bitcoin
notes: First and largest cryptocurrency by market cap

name: Ethereum
notes: Smart contract platform; transitioned to PoS in 2022 (The Merge)

name: Tether
notes: USD-pegged stablecoin; largest stablecoin by volume

name: BNB
notes: Native token of BNB Chain; used for Binance exchange fees

name: Solana
notes: High-throughput smart contract platform; ~65,000 TPS

name: USD Coin
notes: USD-pegged stablecoin by Circle; multi-chain

name: XRP
notes: XRP Ledger; fast cross-border payments

name: Cardano
notes: Peer-reviewed smart contract platform using Ouroboros PoS

name: Avalanche
notes: Multi-chain smart contract platform; sub-second finality

name: Dogecoin
notes: Originally a meme coin; merged mining with Litecoin

name: Polkadot
notes: Cross-chain interoperability protocol; parachain architecture

name: Polygon
notes: Ethereum Layer 2 scaling; now rebranding to POL

name: Litecoin
notes: Bitcoin fork; faster blocks (2.5 min), Scrypt PoW

name: Chainlink
notes: Decentralized oracle network; feeds real-world data to blockchains

name: Uniswap
notes: Governance token of the Uniswap decentralized exchange (DEX)

name: Cosmos
notes: Internet of blockchains; IBC protocol for cross-chain communication

name: Monero
notes: Privacy-focused cryptocurrency; RingCT, stealth addresses

name: Stellar
notes: Fast, low-cost cross-border payments; Stellar Development Foundation

name: Algorand
notes: Pure PoS blockchain; instant finality, no forks by design

name: Filecoin
notes: Decentralized storage network; incentivizes IPFS storage providers
